solutions.title: Style Guide Agent for Online Help

attached_to.activity: Revise and edit content based on editorial review feedback

solutions.title: Weekly Workload Planning
solutions.prompt: Review the following task list and create a realistic weekly workload plan. Separate work into: focused content creation, meetings, live delivery, admin tasks, review/approval time, and strategic work. Highlight potential overload areas or scheduling conflicts.

solutions.title: Meeting Prep Notes
solutions.prompt: Based on this meeting agenda, create concise prep notes including: likely discussion topics, important decisions required, potential risks/blockers, questions to ask, and recommended next steps.

solutions.title: Meeting Summaries
solutions.prompt: Summarize this meeting into: decisions made, actions, owners, blockers, and follow-up questions.

solutions.title: Email Drafting
solutions.prompt: Draft a concise but professional follow-up email summarizing next steps and responsibilities.

solutions.title: Prioritization
solutions.prompt: Review this task list and group into: urgent, high impact, quick wins, and long-term items.

solutions.title: Summarize Feedback Themes
solutions.prompt: Review the following customer feedback, survey responses, webinar questions, and support themes. Identify: recurring themes, common frustrations, requested topics, workflow pain points, and areas where learning content may be missing or unclear. Group findings into meaningful categories.

solutions.title: Identify Common Friction Points
solutions.prompt: Analyze these support cases and customer questions. Identify: recurring friction points, workflows customers struggle with, terminology confusion, onboarding gaps, and areas where additional enablement may reduce support volume.

solutions.title: Prioritize Curriculum Work
solutions.prompt: Review the following list of requested content updates, support trends, and roadmap changes. Prioritize work based on: customer impact, frequency, strategic importance, implementation effort, and business risk.

solutions.title: Generate Roadmap Recommendations
solutions.prompt: Using the following inputs: customer feedback, support trends, adoption gaps, roadmap updates, and existing learning assets, suggest a prioritized learning roadmap for the next quarter.

solutions.title: Detect Content Gaps
solutions.prompt: Compare these product workflows and support themes against the existing training catalog. Identify: missing content, outdated content, duplicate content, and workflows that may require additional enablement.

solutions.title: Convert Notes into Structured Plans
solutions.prompt: Convert these rough planning notes into a structured curriculum plan including: objectives, proposed deliverables, audience, priority level, dependencies, estimated effort, and suggested sequencing.

solutions.title: Draft Session Descriptions
solutions.prompt: Write a professional session description for a customer-facing webinar. Include: who the session is for, the business problem it solves, key takeaways, and expected outcomes. Keep the tone concise, practical, and customer-focused.

solutions.title: Analyze Learning Trends
solutions.prompt: Review this training participation data and identify: popular topics, declining engagement areas, potential content gaps, and recommendations for future learning investments.

solutions.title: Group Requests into Themes
solutions.prompt: Review these customer requests and group them into: onboarding needs, workflow training, reporting/analytics, administration, advanced usage, and troubleshooting themes.

solutions.title: Generate Learning Recommendations
solutions.prompt: Based on these support cases and product usage trends, recommend: training topics, Coffee Break sessions, job aids, certification opportunities, and proactive enablement content.

solutions.title: Improve tone
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this script for a customer audience. Make it more conversational, concise, and easier to follow while keeping technical accuracy.

solutions.title: Generate realistic demo data
solutions.prompt: Generate realistic sample project data for a professional services organization using an ERP system. Include project names, clients, budgets, resources, utilization percentages, and statuses.

solutions.title: Generate scenarios
solutions.prompt: Create three realistic troubleshooting scenarios a project manager might encounter when reviewing project budgets in Vantagepoint.

solutions.title: Create knowledge checks
solutions.prompt: Create five scenario-based knowledge check questions based on this training transcript. Include one correct answer and three plausible distractors.

solutions.title: Convert transcript into assets
solutions.prompt:
Summarize this transcript into:
- Key takeaways
- A one-page job aid
- FAQ-style questions
- A short course description

solutions.title: Bloom's alignment
solutions.prompt: Classify these questions using Bloom's Taxonomy and identify whether they test recall, application, analysis, or evaluation.

solutions.title: Scenario generation
solutions.prompt: Create a realistic customer scenario requiring the learner to troubleshoot a project setup issue.

solutions.title: Improve questions
solutions.prompt: Review this certification question for clarity, ambiguity, and distractor quality. Suggest improvements.

solutions.title: Weak distractor detection
solutions.prompt: Identify which distractors are obviously incorrect and suggest stronger alternatives.

solutions.title: Topic generation
solutions.prompt: Based on these customer questions and support themes, suggest future webinar or Coffee Break topics.

attached_to.category: Live Events — Coffee Breaks & Town Halls

solutions.title: Turn release notes into a session
solutions.prompt: Review these release notes and identify the top 5 customer-impacting changes appropriate for a 30-minute Coffee Break session.

attached_to.category: Live Events — Coffee Breaks & Town Halls

solutions.title: Improve a talk track
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this presentation script to sound more natural and engaging when spoken aloud.

attached_to.category: Live Events — Coffee Breaks & Town Halls
Live Events — Coffee Breaks & Town Halls

solutions.title: FAQ generation
solutions.prompt: Review this webinar transcript and generate a customer FAQ list.

attached_to.category: Live Events — Coffee Breaks & Town Halls

solutions.title: Create a "What Changed" Summary
solutions.prompt: Review these release notes and create: a high-level 'What Changed' summary, key workflow impacts, affected user roles, and features requiring learning updates. Focus on customer-facing impacts, not technical implementation details.

solutions.title: Identify Learning Impact
solutions.prompt: Review these release notes and identify: which courses may require updates, which videos may be outdated, certification impacts, KB articles requiring review, and workflows that may need new enablement content.

solutions.title: Prioritize Content Updates
solutions.prompt: Based on these release changes, prioritize learning updates using: customer impact, workflow disruption, feature visibility, frequency of use, and implementation urgency.

solutions.title: Detect Potentially Outdated Content
solutions.prompt: Compare these release notes against the following learning content and identify: outdated screenshots, obsolete workflows, incorrect terminology, references to retired functionality, and areas requiring revision.

solutions.title: Identify Content Still Valid
solutions.prompt: Review this release information and identify which learning assets remain valid with no updates required. Explain why each asset is still applicable.

solutions.title: Identify Removable Content
solutions.prompt: Review this content catalog and identify: duplicate materials, obsolete content, retired workflows, and low-value assets that could potentially be archived or removed.

solutions.title: Generate Update Recommendations
solutions.prompt: For each impacted learning asset, recommend: the type of update required, estimated level of effort, urgency, and whether the update is minor, moderate, or full redevelopment.

solutions.title: Check Consistency Across Assets
solutions.prompt: Review the following: training materials, certification questions, KB articles, webinar scripts, and online help. Identify inconsistent terminology, tone, feature naming, or workflow explanations.

solutions.title: Generate Release Training Topics
solutions.prompt: Based on these release notes, suggest: Coffee Break topics, webinar ideas, quick tip videos, job aids, and certification update opportunities.

solutions.title: Create Customer-Facing Summaries
solutions.prompt: Rewrite these release notes into a concise customer-friendly summary focused on: business impact, workflow improvements, important changes, and recommended next steps.

solutions.title: Build SME Review Checklists
solutions.prompt: Generate an SME review checklist for validating release-related learning updates. Include: workflow accuracy, terminology validation, screenshot verification, process alignment, and customer impact review.

solutions.title: Generate Testing/Validation Scenarios
solutions.prompt: Create realistic validation scenarios to test whether updated training content still aligns with the latest release functionality.

solutions.title: Compare Old vs New Workflows
solutions.prompt: Compare the previous workflow against the updated release workflow and summarize: what changed, what stayed the same, customer impact, and potential confusion areas.

solutions.title: Generate Internal Readiness Summaries
solutions.prompt: Create an internal release readiness summary for stakeholders outlining: impacted learning assets, update priorities, risks, dependencies, and estimated effort.

solutions.title: Rewrite for LLM Readiness
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this learning title and description to be more LLM-friendly and searchable. Requirements: clearly identify who the content is for, describe the exact task or workflow, explain the outcome or business purpose, use wording customers would realistically search for, avoid vague or overly branded language, and improve clarity for AI retrieval systems.

solutions.title: Review Current Metadata
solutions.prompt: Review the following learning title and description for LLM readiness. Identify: vague wording, missing workflow context, unclear audience, weak search terminology, acronym overuse, and opportunities to improve discoverability.

solutions.title: Generate Search-Friendly Variations
solutions.prompt: Generate five alternative learning titles optimized for: customer search behavior, natural language questions, and AI retrieval systems. Keep the wording clear, task-oriented, and workflow-focused.

solutions.title: Improve Search Intent Alignment
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this description to better align with real customer search intent. Focus on: what problem the user is trying to solve, what workflow they are performing, and what outcome they expect.

solutions.title: Add Workflow Context
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this learning description to clearly explain: the workflow being performed, when a customer would use this process, who performs the task, and the expected result.

solutions.title: Remove Internal Jargon
solutions.prompt: Review this title and description and replace internal terminology or vague phrasing with wording customers would realistically use when searching for help.

solutions.title: Generate User Questions
solutions.prompt: Based on this learning asset, generate realistic customer questions someone might ask an AI assistant or search engine to find this content.

solutions.title: Improve Retrieval Quality
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this content metadata to improve retrieval quality for: AI assistants, enterprise search, knowledge bases, and semantic search systems. Prioritize clarity, specificity, and workflow terminology.

solutions.title: Identify Missing Metadata
solutions.prompt: Review this learning asset and identify missing metadata that may improve discoverability, including: audience, workflow, product area, task type, feature names, and business outcome.

solutions.title: Convert Marketing Language into Instructional Language
solutions.prompt: Rewrite this title and description to focus less on promotional language and more on: the task being completed, the workflow, and the practical learner outcome.

attached_to.activity: Convert Marketing Language into Instructional Language

solutions.title: Generate Keywords & Synonyms
solutions.prompt: Generate: keywords, related terminology, synonyms, alternate workflow names, and customer-friendly phrases that may improve discoverability for this learning asset.

solutions.title: Evaluate LLM Readiness Score
solutions.prompt: Review this learning asset and provide: an LLM readiness score (1–10), strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations to improve AI discoverability and retrieval.

solutions.title: Generate Structured Metadata
solutions.prompt: Create structured metadata for this learning asset including: audience, workflow, task, product area, difficulty level, business outcome, related terminology, and searchable phrases.
